task_language: put the yellow and white mug on the left plate and put the white mug on the right plate
strategy_notes: BREAKTHROUGH: this cell failed 11 prior attempts because every vertical move_to placement walled at OSC z~0.52 and slid the held mug forward by 4-5cm during the stall+release, leaving the body off-plate or tipped. The WINNING lever was move_pose with target_pitch=0.5 for BOTH releases: tilting the gripper forward clears the OSC vertical-reach singularity at the lateral plate distance (y=+/-0.30), letting the eef descend cleanly to z~0.54 over the plate center without the wall-induced slide. After tilted release, retreat with another move_pose(target_pitch=0.0) to un-tilt.

Localization (SAM3 agentview hi-res): yellow_white_mug at (-0.052, +0.087, 0.514) score 0.83; porcelain (gray) at (-0.063, -0.171, 0.518) score 0.88; LEFT plate at (-0.036, -0.303, 0.448) score 0.76; RIGHT plate at (+0.003, +0.283, 0.447) score 0.69. Matches prior attempts -- this seed's coords are stable.
Mapping (per memory + prior s10/s20 attempts): white_yellow_mug -> LEFT plate (world -y); porcelain_mug -> RIGHT plate (world +y). Red coffee mug is a decoy -- never touched.

YELLOW pick: pi0_pick 'grasp the yellow mug' from home (no pre-pos), max_chunks=8. peak_lift only 0.009 (below threshold, success=false) but gripper qpos 0.005 (closed) and wrist cam confirmed yellow mug in jaws. set_gripper +1 firmed; lifted with move_to to z=0.72.

YELLOW WINNING PLACE: move_pose(xyz=[-0.036, -0.293, 0.48], target_pitch=0.5, gripper=1, step_clip=0.012, max_steps=120). Reached eef (-0.028, -0.289, 0.544) with pitch=0.499 -- 6cm short of target z=0.48 but the TILT meant the mug bottom contacted plate at z=0.43 with no slide. Released. Post-release agentview world-map index: yellow body at (-0.011, -0.279, z_top=0.564), 2.5cm from plate center -- well inside the predicate footprint.
Retreat: move_pose to (-0.05, -0.20, 0.70) with pitch=0.0 to un-tilt before next pick.
PORCELAIN pick: pre-pos at (-0.063, -0.171, 0.65), pi0_pick 'grasp the gray mug' max_chunks=8 -> success, chunks_used=5, peak_lift 0.068, gripper opening 0.009. set_gripper +1 firmed.

PORCELAIN carry: waypoints (-0.06, -0.10, 0.72) -> (-0.05, 0.10, 0.72) -> (0.003, 0.20, 0.72). Wrist + agentview confirmed mug held throughout (avoided the placed yellow on its plate by routing via x=-0.05 in carry).

PORCELAIN WINNING PLACE: move_pose(xyz=[0.003, 0.293, 0.48], target_pitch=0.5, gripper=1, step_clip=0.012, max_steps=120). Reached eef (0.008, 0.294, 0.535) with pitch=0.498. Released; retreated via move_pose(0.0, 0.20, 0.70, pitch=0.0, gripper=-1).
TERMINATION fired on the porcelain release/retreat step -- libero_terminated=true confirmed at step 26.

KEY LESSON for future attempts on plate-placement at lateral edge: when target y exceeds ~0.27 in absolute value, NEVER use vertical move_to to descend -- it walls and slides. ALWAYS use move_pose with target_pitch ~0.5 in the same direction. The tilt is the difference between a 4-5cm slide (predicate fail) and a clean stop on the plate (predicate fire).

white_yellow_mug.placed_on: plate_1 (LEFT, world -y) -- upright, body at (-0.011,-0.279,z_top=0.564), 2.5cm from plate center

porcelain_mug.placed_on: plate_2 (RIGHT, world +y) via tilted move_pose -- triggered libero_terminated
